title: Moog City 2
description: Moog City 2 is now a disc!
body: this resource pack replaces the blocks music disc to be playing Moog City 2 instead. And this adds one of the songs from the minecraft soundtrack as a disc and users who downloaded this can enjoy Moog City 2 as a disc. **Be sure that the music disc is called Moog City 2 so if you just search music disc you won't find it so just type in "Moog City 2" in creative search menu if you want it in creative mode** and in survival find a dungeon and go into it's chest
